summary: @acme/billing is the only failing package. Two vitest failures: ProrationCalculator > applies mid-cycle discount correctly (expected 45.00, got 47.50) in src/invoices/prorate.test.ts:33; RefundService > issues partial refund within 30 days (expected status 'refunded', got 'pending') in src/payments/refund.test.ts:61. @acme/shared, @acme/api, and @acme/dashboard all pass.
